label: capability search • skill • keyword-array path
notes: Exercises the keyword path in `SkillSearchService.buildIndexText`: the 'Data Keeper' skill's keywords array carries 'track' and 'expenses' as literal tokens but the description text uses softer phrasing ('Keep structured records across chats'). Index text is `name + keywords + description` (keywords and description used to be mutually exclusive — any skill with one keyword lost its whole description signal), so this case verifies keywords still contribute signal end-to-end now that the description rides along.
